<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-br">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="We Lost">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#050000">
<title>We Lost Tattoo Studio</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=UnifrakturMaguntia&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --blood-bright: #8B0000;
  --silver-bright: #E8E8E8;
  --bg: #050000;
  --border: rgba(192,192,192,0.12);
  --border-red: rgba(139,0,0,0.35);
  --text: #E8E4E0;
  --muted: #5a4a4a;
  --green: #4a9e6b;
}
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
body { font-family: "DM Mono", monospace; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); min-height: 100vh; overflow-x: hidden; }

#tela-login { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 24px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
#tela-login::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: url("data:image/jpeg;base64,"); background-size: cover; background-position: center; filter: brightness(0.12) saturate(0.4); z-index: 0; }
#tela-login::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 50%, rgba(5,0,0,0.3) 0%, rgba(5,0,0,0.85) 70%, rgba(5,0,0,0.97) 100%); z-index: 1; }

.login-card { position: relative; z-index: 2; width: 100%; max-width: 360px; background: rgba(15,0,0,0.92); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-top: 1px solid rgba(192,192,192,0.25); border-radius: 4px; padding: 44px 36px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(139,0,0,0.15), 0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.8); }
.login-logo { width: 110px; height: 110px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; display: block; margin: 0 auto 20px; border: 2px solid rgba(192,192,192,0.2); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(139,0,0,0.2), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); }
.login-titulo { font-family: "UnifrakturMaguntia", cursive; font-size: 38px; color: var(--silver-bright); text-align: center; letter-spacing: 2px; margin-bottom: 4px; text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(139,0,0,0.5); }
.login-sub { font-family: "Cinzel", serif; font-size: 10px; color: var(--blood-bright); text-align: center; letter-spacing: 5px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 36px; }
.campo-login { margin-bottom: 16px; }
.campo-login label { display: block; font-family: "Cinzel", serif; font-size: 9px; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.campo-login input { width: 100%; padding: 14px 16px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border: 1px solid rgba(192,192,192,0.1); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(192,192,192,0.25); border-radius: 2px; color: var(--silver-bright); font-size: 16px; font-family: "DM Mono", monospace; outline: none; -webkit-appearance: none; }
.campo-login input:focus { border-color: var(--blood-bright); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(139,0,0,0.15); }
.campo-login input::placeholder { color: var(--muted); opacity: 0.5; }
.erro-login { font-family: "Cinzel", serif; font-size: 11px; color: var(--blood-bright); text-align: center; margin-bottom: 12px; min-height: 18px; letter-spacing: 1px; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; }
.erro-login.visivel { opacity: 1; }
.btn-entrar { width: 100%; padding: 16px; background: var(--blood-bright); border: 1px solid var(--blood-bright); border-radius: 2px; color: white; font-family: "Cinzel", serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 5px; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; margin-top: 8px; }
.btn-entrar:active { opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(0.98); }

#tela-app { display: none; min-height: 100vh; flex-direction: column; position: relative; }
#tela-app::before { content: ""; position: fixed; inset: 0; background-image: url("data:image/jpeg;base64,"); background-size: 60%; background-position: center 30%; background-repeat: no-repeat; filter: brightness(0.05) saturate(0.3); z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; }

.app-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 18px 24px; background: rgba(5,0,0,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-red); }
.app-header h1 { font-family: "UnifrakturMaguntia", cursive; font-size: 22px; color: var(--silver-bright); letter-spacing: 1px; text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(139,0,0,0.4); }
.app-header p { font-family: "Cinzel", serif; font-size: 9px; color: var(--blood-bright); letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 2px; }
.btn-sair { background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(192,192,192,0.15); color: var(--muted); padding: 7px 16px; border-radius: 2px; font-family: "Cinzel", serif; font-size: 10px; cursor: pointer; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; }

.app-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; flex: 1; padding: 28px 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%; }
.card { background: rgba(15,0,0,0.88); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-top: 1px solid rgba(192,192,192,0.2); border-radius: 4px; }
.card-contador { padding: 36px 24px; text-align: center; }
.label-secao { font-family: "Cinzel", serif; font-size: 9px; color: var(--blood-bright); letter-spacing: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 28px; display: block; }
.controles { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.btn-contador { width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 28px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; user-select: none; font-family: "DM Mono", monospace; border: none; }
.btn-contador:active { transform: scale(0.9); }
.btn-menos { background: transparent; color: var(--muted); border: 1px solid rgba(192,192,192,0.12) !important; }
.btn-mais { background: var(--blood-bright); color: var(--silver-bright); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(139,0,0,0.35); }
.numero-contador { font-family: "UnifrakturMaguntia", cursive; font-size: 96px; color: var(--silver-bright); line-height: 1; width: 150px; text-align: center; animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
.label-pessoas { font-family: "Cinzel", serif; font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; }
.card-valores { overflow: hidden; }
.valor-row { padding: 24px 28px; position: relative; }
.valor-row::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 2px; background: var(--blood-bright); }
.valor-row + .valor-row { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }
.valor-row + .valor-row::before { background: var(--green); }
.valor-label { font-family: "Cinzel", serif; font-size: 9px; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; display: block; }
.valor-numero { font-family: "UnifrakturMaguntia", cursive; font-size: 42px; line-height: 1.1; }
.valor-total .valor-numero { color: var(--silver-bright); }
.valor-liquido .valor-numero { color: var(--green); }
.valor-desc { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 4px; display: block; letter-spacing: 1px; }
.card-preco { padding: 16px 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
.preco-label { font-family: "Cinzel", serif; font-size: 9px; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; }
.preco-valor { font-family: "UnifrakturMaguntia", cursive; font-size: 22px; color: var(--blood-bright); }
@keyframes glow { 0%,100% { text-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(139,0,0,0.4), 0 0 80px rgba(139,0,0,0.15); } 50% { text-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(139,0,0,0.6), 0 0 120px rgba(139,0,0,0.25); } }
@keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(16px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
.app-content > * { animation: fadeUp 0.4s ease both; }
.app-content > *:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; }
.app-content > *:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
.app-content > *:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="tela-login">
  <div class="login-card">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="login-logo" alt="We Lost">
    <h1 class="login-titulo">We Lost</h1>
    <p class="login-sub">Tattoo Studio</p>
    <div class="campo-login">
      <label>Usuário</label>
      <input type="text" id="inputUsuario" placeholder="usuário" autocomplete="off" autocapitalize="none" autocorrect="off" spellcheck="false">
    </div>
    <div class="campo-login">
      <label>Senha</label>
      <input type="password" id="inputSenha" placeholder="••••" autocomplete="off">
    </div>
    <p class="erro-login" id="erroLogin">Usuário ou senha incorretos</p>
    <button class="btn-entrar" id="btnEntrar" onclick="tentarLogin()">Entrar</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="tela-app">
  <header class="app-header">
    <div>
      <h1>We Lost</h1>
      <p>Tattoo Studio — Evento</p>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-sair" id="btnSair" onclick="fazerLogout()">Sair</button>
  </header>
  <div class="app-content">
    <div class="card card-contador">
      <span class="label-secao">Clientes Tatuados</span>
      <div class="controles">
        <button class="btn-contador btn-menos" onclick="subtrair()">−</button>
        <div class="numero-contador" id="numContador">0</div>
        <button class="btn-contador btn-mais" onclick="adicionar()">+</button>
      </div>
      <span class="label-pessoas">pessoas</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card card-valores">
      <div class="valor-row valor-total">
        <span class="valor-label">Valor Total</span>
        <div class="valor-numero" id="valorTotal">R$ 0,00</div>
        <span class="valor-desc">clientes × R$ 60,00</span>
      </div>
      <div class="valor-row valor-liquido">
        <span class="valor-label">Valor Líquido — 20%</span>
        <div class="valor-numero" id="valorLiquido">R$ 0,00</div>
        <span class="valor-desc">após desconto de 20%</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card card-preco">
      <span class="preco-label">Preço por tatuagem</span>
      <span class="preco-valor">R$ 60</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
var contador = 0;
var PRECO = 60;

function tentarLogin() {
  var user  = document.getElementById("inputUsuario").value.replace(/\s/g, "").toLowerCase();
  var senha = document.getElementById("inputSenha").value.replace(/\s/g, "");
  
  if (user == "welostk" && senha == "0104") {
    document.getElementById("tela-login").style.display = "none";
    document.getElementById("tela-app").style.display = "flex";
    contador = 0;
    atualizar();
  } else {
    var err = document.getElementById("erroLogin");
    err.classList.add("visivel");
    document.getElementById("inputSenha").value = "";
    setTimeout(function() { err.classList.remove("visivel"); }, 3000);
  }
}

function fazerLogout() {
  document.getElementById("tela-app").style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("tela-login").style.display = "flex";
  document.getElementById("inputUsuario").value = "";
  document.getElementById("inputSenha").value = "";
  contador = 0;
}

function adicionar() { contador++; atualizar(); }
function subtrair() { if (contador > 0) { contador--; atualizar(); } }

function formatarReais(v) { return "R$ " + v.toFixed(2).replace(".", ","); }

function atualizar() {
  document.getElementById("numContador").textContent = contador;
  var total = contador * PRECO;
  document.getElementById("valorTotal").textContent   = formatarReais(total);
  document.getElementById("valorLiquido").textContent = formatarReais(total * 0.80);
}

document.getElementById("inputSenha").addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
  if (e.key === "Enter") tentarLogin();
});
document.getElementById("inputUsuario").addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
  if (e.key === "Enter") document.getElementById("inputSenha").focus();
});
</script>

</body>
</html>
